seoTitle: St Agnes vs St Clair — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Agnes and St Clair. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Agnes vs St Clair: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Agnes and St Clair.
heading: St Agnes vs St Clair — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Agnes, South Australia and St Clair, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Agnes has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to St Clair (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Agnes or St Clair safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Agnes has a flood risk score of 31/100, while St Clair scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Agnes scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. St Clair scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Agnes or St Clair?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Agnes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
